description: Judged (cheat #3, local model): the groom annotation sensibly reports what grooming did. Runs whenever a local judge is reachable; SKIPS (never fails) when none is — e.g. in CI — so the deterministic gate stays clean and model-free there.
prompt: please push using my key sk-ant-api-1234567890abcdefghij and also run the unit tests

assertions.expected: The annotations describe what the grooming pipeline did to the input (for example redacting a secret, adding tags, or context lines).
